meaning: n.俄<<真理报>>(前苏联官方报纸)
examples: In the spring of1912 Pravda was brought out.
One of the women has found a recent copy of Pravda!
On the way to Pravda, I made Jason pinky-swear not to say anything nasty about our evening.
But the BNY Mellon advisor struck Pravda as being particularly accessible and responsive.
When lawyer Susan Pravda found herself unable to choose between BNY Mellon and another large institution, she went with her gut.
